property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Oracle\ora12g\product\12.2.0\client_1\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Pulse Secure\VC142.CRT\X64\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Pulse Secure\VC142.CRT\X86\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Pulse Secure\TNC Client Plugin\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Imaging\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;JAVA_HOME%\bin;C:\Users\demirci\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Users\demirci\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Users\demirci\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\demirci\AppData\Local\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.2.3\bin;;C:\Users\demirci\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\demirci\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify that the ticket has been played", "Milli Piyango Ticket Test Cases"](1)
